HomeResearchServices

Services

My applied work is at the intersection of experimentation and strategy. I ground my recommendations on behavioural science frameworks (COM-B, EAST, DECIDE), scientific literature, and context-sensitive experimentation.

I can help you:

  • Align your ambitions with real human behaviour
  • Increase adoption of new products, policies, or habits
  • Understand your users and uncover hidden barriers
  • Boost team motivation and organisational culture
  • Integrate AI tools into your workflow thoughtfully
  • Design interventions that drive measurable change
  • Build decision systems for collective intelligence
  • Implement agentic workflows for your organisation

Areas of practice

Behavioural Science & Strategy

Applying COM-B, EAST and DECIDE frameworks to diagnose friction and design evidence-based interventions — for teams, users, or populations.

AI Integration & Workflow

Helping organisations adopt AI tools in a way that fits their culture and decision-making processes. Practical implementation, grounded in organisational behaviour research.

Agentic Systems

Designing autonomous workflows and multi-agent systems that extend your organisation's capacity to act — drawing on research in distributed cognition and complex systems.

Organisational Decision Design

Mapping how decisions are actually made and redesigning the structures, processes, and incentives that shape collective behaviour.

How we can work together

Free 15-min call +

A first conversation to understand your challenge and whether I can help. No commitment.

Behavioural Audit +

I analyse your problem, review the relevant scientific literature, and deliver clear, immediately actionable recommendations.

Experimentation & Testing +

I design and run experiments using qualitative and quantitative methods — A/B tests, interviews, pilots. I analyse the data and hand back a clear actionable summary.

Monthly Retainer +

Think of me as your embedded behavioural strategist. I help you define long-term positioning, gather insights through ongoing research, and adapt to evolving challenges.

I prioritise meaningful missions — from simplifying public services to promoting healthier behaviours. Pricing adapts to scope and deliverables. Nonprofits receive a 50% discount across all services.

Book a call

Use the calendar below to book a free 30-minute discovery call.
